title: Department Manager Vacancy at Star Bazaar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Star Bazaar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Bazaar! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!
